description_long: This is a circular bracelet composed of alternating matte black, deep blue, and metallic silver beads, each separated by thin metallic gold spacers. The beads are rounded and slightly flattened, giving the bracelet a tactile, chunky appearance. The clasp is a lobster-style fastener in a shiny metallic finish, accompanied by a spherical metallic bead at the closure. The blue beads have a subtle marbled texture, while the black beads are smooth and opaque. The metallic spacers and beads add a touch of shine and contrast to the otherwise matte surfaces. The overall design is bold and geometric, with a modern, urban aesthetic.
description: A chunky bracelet featuring alternating black, blue, and metallic beads with gold spacers and a lobster clasp, creating a bold, geometric look.
description_view_0: The bracelet is shown in a full circular form, highlighting the alternating bead colors and the metallic clasp with a spherical bead.
description_view_1: A side profile view, emphasizing the thickness and rounded shape of the beads, with the clasp and spherical bead visible at the top.
description_view_2: Another full circular view, similar to view 0, but with the clasp positioned differently, showing the arrangement of beads and spacers.
description_view_3: A side profile from the opposite direction, again showing the thickness of the beads and the alignment of the clasp and spherical bead.
